query_normalized: testing the equivalence principle with satellite laser ranging physics
rationale: The paper investigates the strong equivalence principle (Nordtvedt effect) using a triple pulsar system, providing a measurement of the Nordtvedt parameter ηₙ. This constitutes same‑mechanism evidence (category a) and a cross‑vocabulary alternative method (category f) for testing the equivalence principle, making it a relevant reference for a literature review on EP tests—even though it does not use satellite laser ranging.
